subcodes.first_line: O ye flowers of the rose-garden of Truth! Your letter has been received. From its contents it was understood that, praise be unto God, ye celebrated a heavenly feast
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گلهای گلشن حقیقت نامه شما رسید از مضمون معلوم گردید که الحمد لله در یوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @love and unity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
